roles.name: Patriarch Strategist
roles.description: Logan-tier kingmaker — designs the over-arching architecture and decides who gets to touch the keyboard.

roles.name: Number One Boy
roles.description: Holds the timeline, herds the family, and absorbs the screaming on behalf of the team.

roles.name: ATN Control Room Operator
roles.description: Steward of permission sets, layouts, and the news ticker of org configuration.

roles.name: Waystar Studios Engineer
roles.description: Builds Apex, LWC, and platform pipework deep inside the Waystar machine.

roles.name: US Practice Lead — Manhattan
roles.description: Sets standards across the American Salesforce craft and reports up to the C-suite.

roles.name: Senior Cruises Consultant — Mumbai
roles.description: Veteran troubleshooter — patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft.

roles.name: Cruises Consultant — Mumbai
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the Cruises division under the senior's eye.

roles.name: Parks Integration Architect — USA
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce, ATN, Parks, and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Parks Senior Integration Eng — Mumbai
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the architect's plan.

roles.name: Parks Integration Engineer — Mumbai
roles.description: Learns the craft — webhooks, batch, callouts and the GoJo-style error handling.

roles.name: Theme Park QA Inspector
roles.description: Finds the broken rollercoaster bolts before the press tour — owner of the bug list.

roles.name: ATN Marketing Practice Lead
roles.description: Lifts the banner for the brand and the message — leads all marketing craft across the conglomerate.

roles.name: ATN Senior Brand Strategist
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather the audience and convert.

roles.name: ATN Brand Coordinator
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward — content, creative, and the daily news cycle.

roles.name: M&A Analyst
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the family and the build team.

roles.name: Senior Studios Engineer — NYC
roles.description: Senior platform engineer in the Manhattan studios — owns the hardest Apex problems.

roles.name: Junior Cruises Consultant — Mumbai
roles.description: First-rotation consultant on the Cruises programme — still learning where the bodies are.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.
